selection.status_reason: Live thesis monitor refreshed the active weekly pick.

reasons: Price trend remains constructive: 5-day momentum is 1.9% and 20-day momentum is 35.3%.
Trend quality is supported by 80% positive sessions over the last 10 trading days and the price sitting 18.3% relative to its 20-day average.
Risk profile shows daily volatility around 3.4%, downside volatility near 2.0%, and a recent max drawdown of 3.8%.
Volume confirmation is -2.3% versus the trailing baseline, which helps separate steady breakouts from thin momentum.
Relative strength is 1.0% versus SPY over 5 days and -0.5% versus the sector ETF.
News signal is bullish with score 0.72, confidence 0.73, and 0.7 weighted articles across 3 sources.
GPT-5 article classification and company-news provider coverage rated the news flow bullish at 0.72, after adjusting for relevance, recency, source quality, and story concentration.
Evidence quality: 4 articles across 3 sources, 0.7 effective weighted articles, average relevance 0.81, average source quality 0.81, confidence 0.73.
Technical weights were calibrated on 2303 historical symbol-weeks against 5-day excess return (IC 0.00).
Overall model score is 0.152 with high confidence.

news_evidence.title: Cisco (CSCO) Extends USGA Partnership to Integrate AI-Ready Infrastructure
news_evidence.llm_reason: Cisco announced a multiyear extension with the USGA to deploy AI-ready networking and related solutions. Positive branding and product showcase for Cisco's AI/networking positioning, but likely low near-term financial impact over the next 1–10 trading days.

news_evidence.title: Cisco Systems Inc. filed 10-Q: 10-Q
news_evidence.llm_reason: Official SEC 10-Q filing for Cisco. Highly material as it contains quarterly financial details and disclosures that could move the stock in the short term; direction and magnitude depend on the filing contents, so no inherent directional score assigned here.
